# Dependencies: Form 1040 Line 23 — Other Taxes From Schedule 2 Line 21 (2025)

> Re-authored 2026-06-14. Source of truth: `lines/23.md`.

---

## Formula

```
Form1040.line23 = Schedule2.line21
```

where, per the 2025 form instruction "Add lines 4, 7 through 16, 18, and 19":

```
Schedule2.line21 = line4 + line7 + line8 + line9 + line11 + line12
                 + line13 + line14 + line15 + line16 + line18 + line19
```

**Line 10 is reserved for future use in 2025** (omitted from `sumAmounts(...)` argument list).
**Line 20 (Section 965 net tax liability installment) is excluded** per the printed 2025 rule.

Storage convention on Form 1040: **null-when-zero** (pass-through read).

Reference implementation — `finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:22005-22070`:

```java
BigDecimal grandTotal = sumAmounts(
    ot.getSelfEmploymentTax(),                                  // line 4   (OOS)
    ot.getTotalAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTax(),           // line 7   (lines 5 + 6)
    ot.getAdditionalTaxOnIras(),                                // line 8
    ot.getHouseholdEmploymentTaxes(),                           // line 9
    // line 10 reserved for future use → always 0 (omitted)
    ot.getAdditionalMedicareTax(),                              // line 11
    ot.getNetInvestmentIncomeTax(),                             // line 12
    ot.getUncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax(),           // line 13
    ot.getInterestOnInstallmentSalesResidentialLots(),          // line 14
    ot.getInterestOnDeferredTaxInstallmentSalesOver150k(),      // line 15
    ot.getRecaptureLowIncomeHousingCredit(),                    // line 16
    line18,                                                     // line 18 (just computed)
    ot.getRecaptureNetEpeForm4255Line1dColL()                   // line 19
);

if (grandTotal != null && grandTotal.compareTo(BigDecimal.ZERO) > 0) {
    ot.setTotalOtherTaxes(roundMoney(grandTotal));
    tac.setOtherTaxes(roundMoney(grandTotal));
}
```

The `tac.setOtherTaxes(...)` call is gated `grandTotal > 0` (null-when-zero). `computeLine20ThroughLine24` reads via `safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes())` → null coerces to zero when forming line 24.

---

## Inputs to Line 23 (Schedule 2 Part II sub-items)

### Implemented sub-items

| Schedule 2 line | IRS label | Java field on `Schedule2OtherTaxes` | Source form / method | Writer call site |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 5 | SS/Medicare tax on unreported tip income | `unreportedTipIncomeTax` | Form 4137 → `TipComputation.totalTipTax()` | `applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes()` |
| 6 | Uncollected SS/Medicare tax on wages | `uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareTaxOnWages` | Form 8919 → `UncollectedComputation.line6Tax()` | `applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes()` |
| 7 | Total = line 5 + line 6 | `totalAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTax` | sum subtotal | `applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes()` |
| 8 | Additional tax on IRAs / tax-favored accounts | `additionalTaxOnIras` | Form 5329 (10% early distribution + other penalties) | `applyForm5329TaxToSchedule2()` |
| 9 | Household employment taxes | `householdEmploymentTaxes` | Schedule H | (writer) |
| 11 | Additional Medicare Tax | `additionalMedicareTax` | Form 8959 line 18 = Part I (wages+tips) + Part III (RRTA) — **G3 fix 2026-04-19** | After `buildForm8959()` at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:991` — supersedes the Part-I-only initial value set by `applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes()` |
| 12 | Net investment income tax | `netInvestmentIncomeTax` | Form 8960 — **implemented** (prior doc note stating it was unimplemented is stale) | (Form 8960 builder) |
| 13 | Uncollected SS/Medicare or RRTA on tips / GTL (W-2 box 12 A/B/M/N) | `uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax` | W-2 box 12 codes | (writer) |
| 14 | Interest §453(l)(3) installment sales (residential lots / timeshares) | `interestOnInstallmentSalesResidentialLots` | §453(l)(3) | (writer) |
| 15 | Interest §453A deferred tax on installment sales over $150k | `interestOnDeferredTaxInstallmentSalesOver150k` | §453A | (writer) |
| 16 | Recapture of low-income housing credit | `recaptureLowIncomeHousingCredit` | Form 8611 | (writer) |
| 17a–17z | Detail lines for additional taxes | various | — | (writers) |
| 18 | Total = sum(17a–17z) | `totalAdditionalTaxes` | sum subtotal | `finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes` (computed locally as `line18` parameter) |
| 19 | Recapture of net EPE from Form 4255 line 1d col (l) | `recaptureNetEpeForm4255Line1dColL` | Form 4255 | (writer) |
| **21** | **Total** | (written to `Schedule2OtherTaxes.totalOtherTaxes` + `TaxAndCredits.otherTaxes`) | `finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes` | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:22005-22070` |

### Out of scope / structurally excluded

| Schedule 2 line | Reason |
|---|---|
| 4 (Self-employment tax / Schedule SE) | Self-employment explicitly OUT OF SCOPE per CLAUDE.md (field exists for compatibility but is never set) |
| 10 (Reserved for future use) | Structurally zero — IRS reservation; omitted from `sumAmounts` |
| 20 (Section 965 net tax liability installment) | Explicitly **excluded** from line 21 per the printed 2025 Schedule 2 instruction |

### Input forms feeding line 23 (taxpayer intake)

| Input form | Schedule 2 sub-item | Source field |
|---|---|---|
| `form-tip-income` | line 5 (via line 7) | Form 4137 tip income → `TipComputation.totalTipTax()` |
| `form-uncollected-ss-medicare` | line 6 (via line 7) | Form 8919 → `UncollectedComputation.line6Tax()` |
| `form-retirement-distribution-extra-tax` | line 8 | Form 5329 early-distribution / excess accumulation penalty |
| `form-form8960` | line 12 | Net investment income tax (NIIT) |
| `form-form8959` | line 11 | Additional Medicare Tax — line 18 sum (Parts I + III RRTA) |

---

## Form 8959 G3 Fix (Part I + Part III)

The Schedule 2 line 11 value is the full Form 8959 line 18 total — the sum of Part I (Additional Medicare on wages / tips) **and** Part III (Additional Medicare on RRTA compensation). The G3 fix at `TaxReturnComputeService.java:991` overrides the Part-I-only initial value previously set by `applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes`:

```java
schedule2.getOtherTaxes().setAdditionalMedicareTax(
    form8959.getLine18TotalAdditionalMedicareTax()
);
```

Form 8959 Part V line 24 (Additional Medicare Tax **withheld**) is a different value entirely — it routes to Form 1040 **line 25c** (withholdingOther), not to Schedule 2 line 11.

---

## G5 Single-Aggregator Pattern

Individual writer methods (`applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes`, `applyForm5329TaxToSchedule2`, the Form 8960 builder, the Form 8959 G3 override, Schedule H writer, Form 4255 writer, etc.) each set **only their own sub-item field** on `Schedule2OtherTaxes`. None of them maintain or write a running grand total.

Only `finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes()` writes `tac.otherTaxes` and `ot.totalOtherTaxes`. The G5 fix removed double-accumulation that previously occurred when individual writers also touched the totals.

---

## Downstream Consumers of `TaxAndCredits.otherTaxes` (line 23)

| Consumer | How used | Location |
|---|---|---|
| `computeLine20ThroughLine24()` | `line24 = line22 + safeAmount(otherTaxes)` → `tac.setTotalTax(line24)` | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:26968-26971` |
| `computeForm2210()` | Part I line 2 = `safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes())` — **G7 fix 2026-04-19** | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:27570-27573` (prior hardcoded 0 understated penalty base) |
| `computeSchedule8812()` Part II-B | ACTC computation reads `schedule2.otherTaxes.uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareTaxOnWages` (line 6) + `uncollectedSocialSecurityMedicareRrtaTax` (line 13) | `TaxReturnComputeService.java:~18159-18163` |
| Frontend `form-tax-return-1040.component.ts` | PDF fill `line23_other_taxes_schedule2_line21` | line 328 |
| Frontend `form-tax-return-schedule2.component.ts` | Displays Part II sub-items; line 21 = `totalOtherTaxes` | line 183 |

---

## Form 8978 Routing (NOT line 23)

Form 8978 (BBA partnership pushout) is documented here only to disambiguate — it does **NOT** feed line 23:

- **Positive** Form 8978 line 14 → Form 1040 **line 16** box 3 ("Form 8978" write-in)
- **Negative** Form 8978 line 14 → **Schedule 3 line 6l** (reduces nonrefundable credits)

Neither path touches Schedule 2 line 21.

---

CSV source: `C:\us-tax\us-tax-ui\public\irs\f1040_field_mapping_semantic.csv` + `f1040s2_field_mapping_semantic.csv`.

---

## Compute Order

```
[Lines 1-15: income / deductions / AGI / taxable income]
computeLine16()
computeLine17() + buildForm8959()
    → after buildForm8959, schedule2.otherTaxes.additionalMedicareTax is updated
      to Form 8959 line 18 full total (Part I + Part III RRTA) — G3 fix
computeLine18()
applyAdditionalSocialSecurityMedicareTaxes()
    → writes Schedule2OtherTaxes sub-item fields: lines 5, 6, 7
    → writes initial Part-I-only additionalMedicareTax (superseded after buildForm8959 by G3 fix)
    → does NOT set totalOtherTaxes or TaxAndCredits.otherTaxes
applyForm5329TaxToSchedule2()
    → writes Schedule2OtherTaxes.additionalTaxOnIras (line 8)
    → does NOT set totals
[Form 8960 builder]
    → writes Schedule2OtherTaxes.netInvestmentIncomeTax (line 12)
    → does NOT set totals
[Schedule H / Form 8611 / Form 4255 / writers for lines 13-19]
    → each writes its own field; none set totals
[Lines 19-21: computeSchedule8812(), applyXxxToSchedule3(), finalizeSchedule3Totals()]
finalizeSchedule2OtherTaxes(schedule2, form1040)              ← G5 single-aggregator
    → computes line 18 internally from 17a-17z fields
    → sums all implemented Part II sub-items into grandTotal
    → if grandTotal > 0:
        ot.setTotalOtherTaxes(roundMoney(grandTotal))
        tac.setOtherTaxes(roundMoney(grandTotal))
    → otherwise leaves both null (null-when-zero)
computeLine20ThroughLine24()
    → reads safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes()) as line 23 (null coerces to zero)
    → line24 = line22 + line23
    → tac.setTotalTax(line24)
computeLine31ThroughLine38()
    → reads tac.getTotalTax() (line 24) — does NOT read otherTaxes directly
computeForm2210()
    → reads safeAmount(tac.getOtherTaxes()) as Part I line 2 (G7 fix)
```

---

## Guardrails (from lines/23.md §5)

| Rule | Notes |
|---|---|
| `line23 = Schedule2.line21` only | Schedule 2 Part I items feed line 17, not line 23 |
| Schedule 2 line 21 excludes line 20 | Section 965 installment is the main 2025 implementation trap |
| Lines 5 + 6 flow only via line 7 | Do not double-count |
| Lines 17a–17z flow only via line 18 | Do not add detail lines and the subtotal both |
| Line 10 is reserved | Omitted from `sumAmounts` rather than passed as zero |
| Form 8959 Part V line 24 is NOT in line 11 | That value goes to Form 1040 line 25c |

---

## Scope Boundaries

### In scope (implemented for 2025)

- Schedule 2 line 5 (Form 4137 — unreported tip income tax)
- Schedule 2 line 6 (Form 8919 — uncollected SS/Medicare on wages)
- Schedule 2 line 7 (lines 5 + 6 subtotal)
- Schedule 2 line 8 (Form 5329 — additional tax on IRAs / tax-favored accounts)
- Schedule 2 line 9 (Schedule H — household employment taxes)
- Schedule 2 line 11 (Form 8959 — Additional Medicare Tax, **full Part I + Part III** via G3 fix)
- Schedule 2 line 12 (Form 8960 — NIIT)
- Schedule 2 lines 13–16, 17a–17z, 18, 19 (writers exist; finalize aggregates)

### Out of scope or excluded

- Schedule 2 line 4 (Schedule SE — self-employment tax) — OOS per CLAUDE.md
- Schedule 2 line 10 (reserved) — structurally zero
- Schedule 2 line 20 (Section 965 installment) — explicitly excluded from line 21 per 2025 form

---

## Known Gaps

None outstanding. Historical gaps G1 (Form 8960 unimplemented note), G3 (Form 8959 Part I only), G5 (double-accumulation), G7 (Form 2210 hardcoded zero) all closed 2026-04-19.
